tool_args.label: LIRR crossing renewal work between Ronkonkoma and Greenport

payload.description: Crossing renewal work between Ronkonkoma and Greenport. Buses replace trains for approximately 48 hours each weekend.

tool_args.label: LIRR bridge replacement on Hempstead Branch

payload.description: Bridge replacement on Tanner Pond Road on the Hempstead Branch between Floral Park and Hempstead. Buses replace trains for approximately 48 hours.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North closed out the month with the highest on-time performance in its 41-year history, with 99.3% of trains arriving at their destination on time
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: St. Albans station elevator for the first time

payload.claim_text: Upon completion, St. Albans customers will enjoy a station elevator for the first time, along with a reconstructed pedestrian tunnel, new HelpPoint emergency kiosks, enhanced security and communication systems, upgrades to lighting, parking, sidewalks, staircases and more.
payload.subject: St. Albans station

tool_args.label: First Confidential Close Call Reporting System Symposium

payload.claim_text: Metro-North spearheaded the first Confidential Close Call Reporting System (C3RS) Symposium. The success of the inaugural symposium has laid the groundwork for its transformation into an annual event and solidifies Metro-North as a leader of safety in the industry.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: MTA Accessibility new station identification system

payload.claim_text: The Accessibility team worked with both railroads to establish a new station identification system using updated iconography. The blue standard ISA symbol is now used for fully accessible stations while the new white symbol is used to denote a step-free access to station platforms.
payload.subject: MTA Accessibility

tool_args.label: 21 stations with Progressive ADA new iconography

payload.claim_text: There are 21 stations on the map now with this new iconography, which they call 'Progressive ADA' as steps are taken to enhance them until they become fully accessible.

tool_args.label: MTAPD February 2024 summonses and arrests increase

payload.claim_text: MTAPD Chief Mueller stated that he is proud of the police force for the increase in the issuance of summonses by 137% and arrests by 60%.
payload.subject: MTA Police Department

payload.raw_value_text: increase in the issuance of summonses by 137%

payload.description: Project to elevate two tracks north of Garrison Station on the Upper Hudson line to address tidal and storm surge challenges. Dumping over 400 tons of stone, using work trains and high rail equipped dump trucks. Elevation of over 12 inches to date, goal to reach 18 inches by early April 2024. Operating funds used.

tool_args.label: LIRR St. Albans ADA Station Upgrade Program

payload.description: Comprehensive ADA station upgrade program at St. Albans. Phase 1 beginning in April, Phase 2 beginning in fall. Upon completion: station elevator for the first time, reconstructed pedestrian tunnel, new HelpPoint emergency kiosks, enhanced security and communication systems, upgrades to lighting, parking, sidewalks, staircases.

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Diamond Project in Grand Central Terminal

payload.description: Diamond Project in Grand Central Terminal that began in January 2024, on track to be completed next week (by early April 2024).

tool_args.label: LIRR West Side Yard Switch Replacement Program

payload.project_name: West Side Yard Switch Replacement Program
payload.description: Major switch replacement program in West Side Yard where Engineering Department has replaced six slip switches so far this year. New switches incorporate updated design with fewer switch components to reduce chances of switch failures.

warnings: project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Emergency and Scheduled Bus Services Contracts

payload.project_name: Emergency and Scheduled Bus Services Contracts
payload.description: Competitively solicited and negotiated miscellaneous service contracts in estimated aggregate budget of $55 million to furnish emergency and scheduled bus services on as-needed basis for railroad passengers and/or crews between stations in NY and CT during scheduled and emergency track outages and service disruptions. Selected thirteen bus providers. Five-year contracts with previously established hourly rates. Funded by Operating Budget, Capital Budget, and CT DOT.
